mapper.sql: s.id, s.plan_id, s.stu_id, s.usual_score, s.report_score, s.defense_score, s.total_score, s.grade, s.score_remark, s.score_teacher, s.score_time, s.create_time, s.update_time, p.plan_name as plan_name, st.student_name as student_name, st.student_no as student_no
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_score s LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON s.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student st ON s.stu_id = st.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM train_score s LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON s.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student st ON s.stu_id = st.id
AND s.plan_id = #{planId} AND s.grade LIKE CONCAT('%', #{grade}, '%')
ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_score (plan_id, stu_id, usual_score, report_score, defense_score, total_score, grade, score_remark, score_teacher, score_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{stuId}, #{usualScore}, #{reportScore}, #{defenseScore}, #{totalScore}, #{grade}, #{scoreRemark}, #{scoreTeacher}, #{scoreTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_score WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_score s LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON s.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student st ON s.stu_id = st.id WHERE s.plan_id = #{planId} AND s.stu_id = #{stuId} LIMIT 1
